title: Forge & Fables II
description: Tech meets Pokémon: automate, survive, and catch 'em all!
body:
#
Welcome to **[WIP]** 'Forge & Fables II'!


##
Modpack Features

### 🌍 Worldgen & Exploration 🌎 _Explore, Explore, Explore!_ - Experience & Explore Larger, More Layed out Biomes to get a Fresh & Unique experience every time thanks to our World Generation Mods like [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) and [Continents](https://modrinth.com/datapack/continents)! - While exploring you will also be encountering many new Plants & Crops from mods like [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) (+ Add-ons) that you will be able to Farm, which are integrated with [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) to more effectively grow certain Crops depending on the Season! - There are plenty of non-vanilla Dimensions for you to explore! A good example of relatively new one would be _The Other Side_ from [Deeper and Darker](), as well as some of the more classic ones; [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) and [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)!

### ![poke_ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b515403f9389a30ec023f7918372fc42e0c2e5b.png) Pokémon & Custom 'Mons ![poke_ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c26aac2724cf2f732bf190e2f5fefe413de1dff6.png) _Gotta catch 'em all!_ - We use the very beloved and easily customizable [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod in order to give players the best Pokémon experience within Minecraft! - There are also plenty of add-on to build upon the foundation of base Cobblemon, such as [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) which adds Mega Evolution and many other features from other Pokémon games, while something like [Raid Dens](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonraiddens) expand on ways to obtain Pokémon! - We also couldn't exclude some amazing Datapacks such as [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) to expand even more upon available Pokémon & their Variants, and even [ATM x MSD - Radiants](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-radiants) to expand even more upon that idea! - Lastly, we have our own mod called [Cobbleworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbleworks-fw) which adds a few Custom 'Mons inspired by various things, including one Custom Mega Evolution!

### ⚔️ Weapons & Tools 🛠️ _Craft Some Trusty Tools!_ - The Combat Experience has been completely overhauled by the [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) Mod, allowing for easier, more consistent hits and being able hold down your Attack Button as well as introducing more Strengths & Weaknesses depending on what type of Weapon you are wielding! - There's also plenty of Craftable and Upgradables Weapons & Tools to extend progression and give you as the player more options, like [Immersive Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ores) that adds unique craftable Tools & Weapons that expand upon Netherite! - Lastly, there are new Mobs, as well as Mob Variants to test out your new arsenal on!

### ⚙️ Machinery & Quality of Life ⛏️ _Become a self-proclaimed Engineer!_ - With [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (+ Add-ons) you will be able to make very complex machinery and set up automations that vanilla won't allow you to do, all while keeping it looking and feeling interesting! - The [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) Mod is also included within the modpack, changing a lot of the game from a technical perspective, most notably being able to move certain Entities with Pistons (such as Chests!) - You can't have a Modpack without any Quality of Life. We have added mods to make your experience more enjoyable, seemless & immersive! - The Performance of the Modpack remains (relatively) stable thanks to mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions)!

### 🏡 Building Blocks & Decoration 🏮 _Build away!_ - We have added [Stoneworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) to expand on Vanilla Blocks (Variants), giving you many more Vanilla-friendly options to build with! - Other than the Lots & Lots of Building Blocks that have been added, there are also a few new Decoration Blocks available, such as the Magical Lanterns from [Arcane Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcane-lanterns/versions) or Functional Trash Cans from the [Trash Cans](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans/versions) Mod! - [Every Compat (Wood)](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat) and [Every Compat (Stone)](https://modrinth.com/mod/stone-zone) have also been included, automatically implementing a lot of recipes with custom wood & stone types!

### 🖼️ Textures & Shaders ☀️ _Prettifying your game since 2026!_ - Our Modpack makes use of [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) to the best Minecraft Shaders experience to you! - By Default, you will have access to the [Complementary - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) & [Solas](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader) Shader Packs, but you can always import any Shader Packs of your own choosing! - We also use [Colorwheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorwheel) to optimize supported Modpacks to increase performance drastically when rendering moving parts from mods like Create! - Our Pack also comes with [Unique Dark - Lite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark), [ATM x MSD](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy), [Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons), [Emissive Cobblemon Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-emissive-ores) and [Just Expressions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/just-expressions) Enabled by Default to give players a Clean Dark-mode Experience and a few great Quality of Life Features right out the box!

_(Unique Dark - Lite can be toggled within the Resource Pack menu in-game!)_

## Additional Information

### 📈 Memory Settings 📉 _Where did my frames go?_ - Make sure you Allocate plenty of Memory (RAM) to your Minecraft instance! - Unsure how to do that? It's easy: 1. Open up the **_Modrinth App_** 2. Head to your **_'Forge & Fables II'_** Instance (where you Launch the Modpack!) 3. Press the **_Big Cogwheel_** (⚙️) in the Top-Right Corner 4. Head to the **_(🍵) 'Java and memory'_** Tab 5. Check (✅) the **_'Custom memory allocation'_** box 6. Change the value to **_'6144' (MB)_**, or to **_'10240' (MB)_** for beefier PC's! 7. Enjoy!

### 👥 Public Server 👥 _Time to build a community!_ - This Modpack comes with a Ready-to-Play Multiplayer Experience right from the moment you first launch the game! Within this server we like to chill, host events, battle, be a helping hand and so much more, so if you're up to meet some new people make sure to come on down so we can help you get started right away!

(This Public Server of ours is hosted by **fableworks.eu**)
